---
title: 'Music/JoAnn/Word'
date: '2016-04-03T04:43:00.0040000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '3176309457421706514'
blogger_filename: '/2016/04/musicjoannword.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Word From God'
  - 'JoAnn'
  - 'Music'
---

<br />
JoAnn had said something to me about music the first day we met, but I couldn't remember what she said. So I asked if she remembered, this was her reply:<br />
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
<br />"What the Holy spirit reminded me of and said is the important part to remember- is: that music is one the gifts God gave you and your gift will make room for you.... yes you need to pursue it but with consistency  (not sure what that means...hope you do ).... don't rush it...let the Holy Spirit lead. ...but watch carefully for his direction..."</blockquote>
Darrell<br />
&nbsp;FW: SMS from Darrell Wolfe [(760) 399-7802]
